queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating effect of having no checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Investigation into the contribution of employment duration less than one year to increased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of maintaining a checking account balance below zero on the reduction of credit risk.
